title: Conchidium extinctorium
taxonomy: Conchidium extinctorium is a genus of epiphytic ferns in the family Polypodiaceae. Conchidium extinctorium is native to tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The classification of Conchidium extinctorium is further divided into several species, each with unique characteristics. Conchidium extinctorium species are often found growing on tree trunks and branches in shaded, humid environments. Further classification of the genus is still being researched and refined by botanists.
